info.title: Api
info.description:
Levy Collection Practice Management Platform API.

**Interactive docs:** [Swagger UI](/api/docs)

**Authenticate:** Call `POST /auth/login`, copy the `token` from the response,
then click **Authorize** in Swagger UI and paste `Bearer <token>`.

get.summary: Get all matters for a debtor

post.summary: Generate a document for a matter
Bulk generate documents for multiple matters

get.summary: Get top overdue tasks for dashboard

patch.summary: Archive a task (removes from dashboard and diary)

bearerAuth.description: JWT from POST /auth/login — use format: Bearer <token>
